headline: Arista Networks (ANET) Stock After 87% Annual Gain Is It Time To Pause?
summary: If you are wondering whether Arista Networks stock offers good value after a strong run, it can help to separate price excitement from what the underlying numbers say. The share price last closed at US$168.01, with returns of 10.4% over 7 days, 18.3% over 30 days, 25.8% year to date and 87.3% over 1 year. This naturally raises questions about how much optimism is already reflected. Recent coverage has focused on Arista Networks as a key player in data center networking and cloud...

headline: Arista’s Very Good, Very Bad Year
summary: The networking company is drowning in the best demand its CEO has ever seen, and that’s precisely the problem.
